calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-11-2013 Off Calendar

Request For Prove Up Hearing Or Alternatively, Court Judgment
Off Calendar Dec-20-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Donald Sullivan, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Sonia Wong, #11288.

Jordan A. Lavinsky, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, Emporium Mall LLC.
Jaon Kapuscinsky sworn and examined on behalf of the Plaintiff.
No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) Tal Zissu.
Defult of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.
Court ordered Defendants Does 1-10 dismissed without prejudice.

After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

Damages: $195,750.59
Attorney's Fees: $5,817.60
Costs: $930.00
Total Judgment in the amount of $202,498.19
Judgment signed in open court.
